== Notes for [[Item:Q3800|Q3800]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-242023/search/0/Pedro+de+Castro+Polanco

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBD04B01EFBBFA9822EF79916C404D
geni:6000000078223054838
